rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.sonuc: (1 / Math.max(0.0001, R)) * Math.sqrt(Math.max(0.0001, L / Math.max(0.0001, C)))

hiddenLossDrivers: Low Q factor indicates broader frequency response.
suggestedActions: Verify component tolerances affect circuit performance.
Use proper safety equipment for high voltage/current work.

description.short: Calculate RLC circuit resonant frequency and Q factor.
description.long: Calculate RLC circuit resonant frequency and Q factor.

short_i18n.fr: Calculer la fréquence de résonance et le facteur Q d'un circuit RLC.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la frecuencia de resonancia y el factor Q de un circuito RLC.
short_i18n.ar: حساب تردد الرنين وعامل الجودة لدائرة RLC.
